name: code-review
description: Review code files for bugs, security issues, performance problems, and style. Use when the user asks to review code, check for issues, audit a file, or wants feedback on implementation quality. Works with any programming language.
author: pantheon

parameters.name: file_path
parameters.description: Path to the file to review (relative to workspace)

parameters.name: focus
parameters.description: What to focus on: bugs, security, performance, style, or all
